statement_of_purpose: I am a final-year Computer Science and Engineering student at Daffodil International University (CGPA: 3.94/4.00) with an Erasmus+ exchange experience at Malardalen University, Sweden. My research focuses on deep learning, computer vision, and explainable AI with applications in healthcare and agriculture. I have a published journal paper in Machine Learning and Knowledge Extraction (MDPI) on Lyme disease detection using hybrid deep learning, another paper under major revision at PeerJ Computer Science (Q1) on jackfruit disease classification with XAI, and two IEEE conference proceedings. As a Teaching Assistant under Professor Dr. Fernaz Narin Nur and a researcher at the Health Informatics Research Lab, I am deeply committed to impactful research. I am seeking a graduate position where I can advance my expertise in explainable AI and medical image analysis under expert supervision.
